all_violations.description: Queue-card assertions are conditional, so tests may pass even when shared primitives fail to render.
all_violations.suggestion: Seed deterministic fixture data and assert queue-card/pill primitives unconditionally.

all_violations.description: Thread-detail validation path has multiple fallback branches that weaken deterministic coverage.
all_violations.suggestion: Stabilize fixture setup so thread-header path is always exercised in this scenario.

all_violations.description: Per-item safety assertions can be skipped when operatorCopy is empty.
all_violations.suggestion: Assert minimum non-empty primary copy contract before suppression checks.

all_violations.description: Aria-label validation is split across fallback branches, reducing consistency of assertion scope.
all_violations.suggestion: Standardize primary-action test id contract and assert one deterministic path.

all_violations.description: Suite-level serial mode reduces isolation guarantees and can hide latent order coupling.
all_violations.suggestion: Use parallel mode by default and isolate any truly dependent scenario into a dedicated block.

all_violations.description: API automate suite is forced serial despite read-oriented scenarios.
all_violations.suggestion: Allow parallel execution to validate independence and improve CI throughput.

all_violations.description: File exceeds TEA DoD target (<300 lines), increasing cognitive load and debugging cost.
all_violations.suggestion: Split by AC into focused files (tokens/primitives, display-safety, responsive behavior).

all_violations.description: URL builder and context helpers are duplicated across ATDD and automate E2E specs.
all_violations.suggestion: Extract shared g-1 URL/test utilities under tests/support/helpers/connectshyft-g1.ts

all_violations.description: Automate spec repeats route builders and css reader helpers from ATDD spec.
all_violations.suggestion: Reuse shared helper module with typed exports for URL and metric readers.

all_violations.description: Tests only encode priority labels; structured story-level test IDs are missing.
all_violations.suggestion: Adopt stable IDs like G1-ATDD-API-001 in titles for traceability.

all_violations.description: Nested fallback branches increase complexity and reduce readability in core scenarios.
all_violations.suggestion: Normalize fixture preconditions and split alternate paths into separate tests.

all_violations.description: Inline object-walking utility logic is dense and repeated for payload extraction.
all_violations.suggestion: Extract reusable projection helper with explicit typing and unit tests.

all_violations.description: AC1 API ATDD contract test is still skipped.
all_violations.suggestion: Remove test.skip and make the token-contract assertion executable in CI.

all_violations.description: AC2 API ATDD primitive-contract test is still skipped.
all_violations.suggestion: Unskip and verify primitive metadata contract through stable API fixtures.

all_violations.description: AC3 API ATDD display-safe projection test is still skipped.
all_violations.suggestion: Enable execution to ensure metadata suppression remains merge-blocking.

all_violations.description: AC4 API ATDD responsive breakpoint contract test is still skipped.
all_violations.suggestion: Unskip and enforce token-scale/touch-target API contract checks.

all_violations.description: Fallback visibility assertions can mask missing primitive-specific checks.
all_violations.suggestion: Add explicit failure when expected primitive test ids are absent for covered AC paths.

all_violations.description: Display-safe assertions are bypassed for empty operator copy values.
all_violations.suggestion: Assert non-empty projection first, then run suppression checks for every item.

all_violations.description: Automate E2E suite disables parallelization using serial mode.
all_violations.suggestion: Run in parallel and isolate only order-dependent scenarios.

all_violations.description: Automate API suite also enforces serial mode without demonstrated state coupling.
all_violations.suggestion: Remove serial mode to reduce wall-clock CI time.

all_violations.description: Each scenario performs full login + multi-page navigation, increasing runtime overhead.
all_violations.suggestion: Use storageState/session fixture and focused setup utilities per test intent.

all_violations.description: Viewport loop replays full navigation flow three times in one test, increasing test duration.
all_violations.suggestion: Split per-breakpoint checks into parametrized tests for parallel workers.

high_severity_violations.description: File exceeds TEA DoD target (<300 lines), increasing cognitive load and debugging cost.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Split by AC into focused files (tokens/primitives, display-safety, responsive behavior).

high_severity_violations.description: AC1 API ATDD contract test is still skipped.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Remove test.skip and make the token-contract assertion executable in CI.

high_severity_violations.description: AC2 API ATDD primitive-contract test is still skipped.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Unskip and verify primitive metadata contract through stable API fixtures.

high_severity_violations.description: AC3 API ATDD display-safe projection test is still skipped.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Enable execution to ensure metadata suppression remains merge-blocking.

high_severity_violations.description: AC4 API ATDD responsive breakpoint contract test is still skipped.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Unskip and enforce token-scale/touch-target API contract checks.

high_severity_violations.description: Automate E2E suite disables parallelization using serial mode.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Run in parallel and isolate only order-dependent scenarios.

high_severity_violations.description: Automate API suite also enforces serial mode without demonstrated state coupling.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Remove serial mode to reduce wall-clock CI time.

top_10_recommendations.recommendation: Split oversized E2E ATDD file into AC-scoped specs
Deduplicate g-1 helper logic across ATDD and automate suites
Adopt structured test IDs for story-level traceability
Unskip all 4 API ATDD tests to restore AC-level contract coverage
Tighten E2E primitive assertions to fail when required primitives are absent
Require non-empty operator copy contracts before suppression checks
Eliminate fallback-only branches in core P0 scenarios
Require deterministic fixture data so primitives always render in ATDD runs
Avoid skipping per-item copy assertions when projection data is empty
Remove serial mode where tests do not share mutable state
